top_findings.title: No Java source files produced — agent generated only project scaffolding
top_findings.evidence: find rep3/src -name '*.java' returns 0 files; only pom.xml, README.md, .gitignore, and src/test/resources/application.properties exist
top_findings.suggestion: Agent must generate Java source files (controllers, models, repositories, application class) to implement the API

top_findings.title: POST /books endpoint missing — no controller code
top_findings.evidence: No .java files in src/; no BookController or equivalent
top_findings.suggestion: Create a Spring Boot @RestController with @PostMapping for /books

top_findings.title: GET /books list endpoint missing — no controller code
top_findings.evidence: No .java files in src/; no list endpoint implementation
